source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-06..07-12, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split; + cumulative 2026-06-01..07-12 for significance) + Shopify orders/sessions (last 90d, by country)
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: MONDAY VERDICT (2026-07-13). EN A/B: NO SIGNIFICANT WINNER — conclude the test. Cumulative 6wk (06-01..07-12): A 0.80% (71 conv / 8,929 sess) vs B 0.84% (76 conv / 8,999 sess), two-proportion z = -0.37 (not significant), and neither variant has reached the ~100 conv/variant threshold. B's early lead was small-sample noise and has fully regressed. RECOMMENDATION: stop waiting on this A/B (traffic is too low + LP->checkout attribution too lossy to ever resolve a ~0.04pp gap); ship the shared staged improvements (18k copies-sold + enlarged hero stats + 'buy 3 get 10%' bundle offer) to BOTH A & B, and launch V3 as a genuinely different challenger. No variant paused (both healthy). Localized IT/FR/DE: HOLD, do not pause (tracking artifact, real Shopify demand).

experiments.name: Big Box LP — Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).
experiments.polly_note: VERDICT: no significant winner, test concluded. This week A 1.18% (17 txn) vs B 1.00% (14 txn) by page; lp_a 0.96% vs lp_b 0.89% by ad-content. Cumulative z=-0.37, both variants under 100 conv. Ship shared improvements to A & B and move to V3.

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / FR / DE)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated A/B variants would convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN.

real_sales_90d.note: Refreshed 2026-07-13 via live Shopify pull (orders by shipping_country, revenue = net_sales EUR; conv = sessions_that_completed_checkout / sessions by session_country, 90d). Confirms the near-0% LP conv is a MEASUREMENT artifact (lossy LP->checkout attribution), not a funnel failure.

experiments.polly_note: VERDICT: HOLD, do not pause. Localized LP conv reads 0-1.6% but Shopify shows IT/DE/FR converting at 1.9-3.6% with real revenue (IT remains 3rd-largest market, 143 orders / €10,153 in 90d). Action unchanged: fix GA4 purchase-currency + fire the same GA4 property through checkout so LP-level conv becomes true.

built_not_yet_live.name: Enlarged hero stats + 'Buy 3 products, get 10% off' bundle offer (all live LPs; offer on A & B)
built_not_yet_live.note: Reference built + previewed; pending Lucas design sign-off, then sweep 21 pages. Live LPs still show 16,000+ — 18k update NOT deployed yet. Now the recommended next move per Monday verdict: ship to both A & B in one deploy with the 16,000->18,000 update, once the lp deploy path is confirmed with Bengt.

built_not_yet_live.name: V3 (bundle widget + UGC reel + FB comment proof)
built_not_yet_live.note: Promoted to PRIORITY next test per Monday verdict — the EN A/B concluded with no winner, so a genuinely different challenger (V3) is the right next experiment vs the shared-improved control.

built_not_yet_live.name: Try the Game (interactive 3-phase playable demo)
built_not_yet_live.note: Play-before-you-pay hook. Candidate for its own dedicated LP + Meta test.
